title: Compliance: lichen/app_identity/app_identity.c TOFU
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.6. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/app_identity/app_identity.c. Status: VIOLATION. lichen_app_identity_upsert_peer_key() silently updates peer pubkey (line 234-236) without TOFU enforcement. Spec requires: pin on first contact, reject changes. Fix: add key change detection before upsert.
close_reason: Fixed: Added TOFU check in lichen_app_identity_upsert_peer() - returns -EEXIST if pubkey differs from existing
